Re: IPTV - Die Zukunft des Fernsehens hat begonnen. IPTV - television's future has arrived. Want your favorite TV channels anywhere in the world? IPTV delivers them - not to your TV screen, but through your TV. And maxx-tv AG is among the first movers in this fast-growing market. The company is even set to break into the USA, the world's biggest TV market, in Fall 2008, offering German programming to more than 40 million German speakers. Better still: the set-top-box maker is footing the bill for the marketing campaign. On that basis, our recommendation is: BUY (SPECULATIVE) Maxx-TV AG.
